ads.hook: Watch blush color change on your skin in real time
ads.metric: running 22+ months (avg 663 days per Evolut 2026 report)

ads.hook: Ingredient-led demo proves results before the sale
ads.metric: running 20+ months (600+ day lifespan per BeautyMatter 2026)

ads.hook: Celebrity holds product — looks like editorial, not an ad
ads.format: earned-media aesthetic static image, lifestyle setting

ads.hook: Skin concern left panel, product result right panel — split image
ads.metric: running 9+ months (top 30-day Meta survivor in beauty niche 2026)

ads.hook: Slouch before vs. straight back after — one image, zero words
ads.metric: running 8+ months (evergreen Meta survivor, multi-source confirmed 2026)

ads.hook: 10 minutes on the mat — outcome-first UGC claim
ads.format: UGC testimonial, problem-solution, Day 1 vs Day 30
ads.metric: running 7+ months (30+ day Meta fitness survivor, Brandsearch June 2026)

ads.hook: Product shot, zero copy — premium silence signals confidence
ads.format: clean static image, plain product offer, no discount

ads.hook: Swipe to see fur pile — golden retriever grooming in 4 slides
ads.format: carousel demo, problem-solution, plain product offer
ads.metric: running 5+ months (30+ day Meta survivor, Dropship Spy April 2026)

ads.hook: 8 styles, lifestyle photography — scroll to find your fit
ads.format: carousel 4-8 product variants, lifestyle shots, plain offer
ads.metric: running 5+ months (carousel dominant format for 30-day+ fashion ads, Brandsearch 2026)

ads.hook: Starts mid-action — crumbs vanish from keyboard in 3 seconds
ads.format: demo, no intro, multiple use-case scenes
ads.metric: running 6+ months ($25.6M GMV, sustained TikTok spend, WinningHunter 2026)

ads.hook: Real footage — catches delivery, pet, late-night movement
ads.format: everyday unfiltered footage, problem-reveal, plain offer
ads.metric: running 6+ months ($25.4M GMV, ongoing TikTok spend, WinningHunter 2026)

ads.hook: I wore this every day for one week — back pain gone
ads.metric: running 5+ months (top TikTok Shop category, multi-source confirmed 2026)

strategies: Run static before/after images in beauty and fitness — they outlast video in those niches.
Carousel with 4-8 lifestyle variants is the longest-surviving apparel format on Meta.
Lead with the problem in the first second — pain-point openers dominate 30-day survivors.
One clear idea per ad: longest-runners communicate a single benefit, not a feature list.
Demo mid-action with no intro — skip the setup, show the result instantly on TikTok.
summary: The longest-running ads across both platforms share three traits: they open with a vivid pain point or visual pattern interrupt, communicate exactly one idea without clutter, and use formats native to the platform (static split-screen on Meta, unpolished mid-action demo on TikTok). With the median DTC ad dead in 17 days, ads surviving 6-22 months represent a tiny, verified group — all are problem-solvers in evergreen niches (beauty, wellness, home, pet) where the product result is immediately visible. Beauty and wellness dominate because transformation is demonstrable in seconds, giving the creative permanent replay value across cold audiences.
